title: sclarea nutans
intro: Sclarea nutans, also known as Clary Sage, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Clary Sage include essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
